creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tobik
Date: Thu Jun 14 17:13:04 UTC 2018
New revision: 472386
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/472386

Log:
  Mark net/p5-ZConf and related ports as deprecated

  ZConf is unmaintained with glaring issues in bits of it and the
  developer did not have time to properly address them in over 8
  years.

  PR:		223471
  Submitted by:	Zane C. Bowers-Hadley <vvelox@vvelox.net> (maintainer and upstream developer)

Changes:
  head/astro/p5-ZConf-Weather/Makefile
  head/deskutils/p5-ZConf-BGSet/Makefile
  head/deskutils/p5-ZConf-Runner/Makefile
  head/deskutils/p5-ZConf-Runner-GUI-GTK/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-ZConf-GUI/Makefile
  head/graphics/p5-Image-Size-FillFullSelect/Makefile
  head/graphics/p5-Imager-AverageGray/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Mail-Cache/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Mail-IMAPTalk-MailCache/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-ZConf-Mail/Makefile
  head/net/p5-ZConf/Makefile
  head/net/p5-ZConf-Bookmarks/Makefile
  head/sysutils/p5-ZConf-Cron/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-Text-SpellChecker-GUI/Makefile
  head/www/p5-ZConf-RSS/Makefile
  head/www/p5-ZConf-RSS-GUI-GTK/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/p5-PerlFM/Makefile
